project.name: BuyerEdgeStrategy Intraday Options Bot
project.description: In-depth structure graph for a single-file intraday NSE F&O options buying algorithm and its observed runtime logs.

nodes.name: BuyerEdgeStrategy.py
nodes.summary: Single-file OpenAlgo NSE options buying bot with configuration, data fetch, five-layer scoring, strike selection, risk sizing, websocket protection, and order management.

nodes.name: Logs.txt
nodes.summary: Runtime log from the BuyerEdgeStrategyBot showing startup, websocket smoke test, repeated NIFTY scans, signal panels, risk sizing blocks, and outside-market-hours loop behavior.

nodes.name: BotConfig
nodes.summary: Typed runtime configuration surface for API connection, universe, scoring, risk, timing, trailing, and execution flags.

nodes.summary: Builds typed configuration from environment variables and applies exchange, risk, timing, and data defaults.

nodes.name: BotConfig.validate
nodes.summary: Validates startup configuration and halts on unsafe or inconsistent values.

nodes.name: OrderManager.place_entry
nodes.summary: Places or simulates a BUY, applies preflight liquidity checks, polls fills, and registers the position.

nodes.summary: Cancels protection orders when needed, places or simulates SELL exit, records PnL, and cleans state.

nodes.name: OrderManager.check_pending_entries
nodes.summary: Reconciles pending BUY orders and protects against post-cutoff fills.

nodes.name: OrderManager.check_pending_exits
nodes.summary: Reconciles pending SELL exits and releases retry state on rejected exits.

nodes.name: OptionsBuyerEdgeBot.scan_underlying
nodes.summary: Runs the full per-underlying scan: data fetch, smoothing, scoring, strike selection, sizing, and entry.

nodes.name: OptionsBuyerEdgeBot._strategy_thread
nodes.summary: Runs the clock-anchored loop for reconciliation, square-off, hold-time exits, and scans.

nodes.name: OptionsBuyerEdgeBot._test_websocket
nodes.summary: Smoke-tests REST auth, websocket transport, authentication, subscription, and tick delivery.

nodes.name: OptionsBuyerEdgeBot.run
nodes.summary: Starts registration checks, position restoration, websocket feed, strategy thread, and shutdown handling.

nodes.name: Five-Layer Confirmation
nodes.summary: Entry decision combines technical trend, OI flow, greeks/GEX, IV and straddle behavior, and synthetic futures co-movement.

nodes.name: Score and Trap Gates
nodes.summary: Signals execute only when absolute score clears the effective min score and trap risk remains below the configured max trap.

nodes.name: OI Flow Intelligence
nodes.summary: PCR, CE/PE price-volume-OI classification, OI walls, and OI velocity convert option-chain behavior into directional evidence.

nodes.name: GEX Regime
nodes.summary: Net GEX, gamma flip, walls, and punch targets influence whether price movement is expected to accelerate or dampen.

nodes.name: IV and Straddle Layer
nodes.summary: IV rank and straddle velocity estimate whether long options have premium expansion edge or IV crush risk.

nodes.name: Synthetic Futures Confirmation
nodes.summary: Spot and synthetic-future co-movement is used as an extra directional confirmation or divergence warning.

nodes.name: Strike Asymmetry Selection
nodes.summary: Candidate strikes are scored by IV cheapness, OI concentration, volume concentration, and delta target fit.

nodes.name: Risk Sizing Block
nodes.summary: Runtime logs show signals were blocked because one NIFTY lot risk exceeded the configured 1 percent risk cap.

nodes.name: Runtime Data Quality
nodes.summary: Logs show VWAP volume and IVR were unavailable on every scan, muting two scoring layers.

nodes.name: WebSocket Protection Loop
nodes.summary: Live ticks update LTP state and drive premium SL, target, breakeven, spot trail, and deep-OTM delta exits.

nodes.name: Order Reconciliation
nodes.summary: Pending entries/exits and broker SL/target fills are polled to prevent orphaned order state.

nodes.name: Runtime Log Summary
nodes.summary: Observed 94 scan panels, 49 qty-zero risk blocks, 0 entry orders, and 0 exit orders. The run scored signals but did not place trades.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Environment-driven strategy, execution, risk, timing, and routing settings.

layers.name: State and Models
layers.description: Dataclasses and shared mutable state that represent scores, positions, pending orders, and chain history.

layers.name: Market Data and Feature Extraction
layers.description: OpenAlgo data access plus greeks, GEX, IVR, expiry, candles, quotes, and synthetic futures.

layers.name: Signal Intelligence
layers.description: OI flow smoothing/classification and five-layer scoring with trap detection.

layers.name: Risk, Stops, and Strike Selection
layers.description: Entry stop policy, strike asymmetry filters, capital sizing, and session risk gates.

layers.name: Execution and Protection
layers.description: Websocket tick handling, trailing exits, order placement, broker protection, and reconciliation.

layers.name: Bot Orchestration
layers.description: Startup, component wiring, scan loop, websocket smoke test, square-off, and shutdown.

layers.name: Runtime Evidence
layers.description: Logs and derived findings from the observed run.

tour.title: Start at the Bot
tour.description: Begin with the top-level orchestrator and entry point to see how the bot wires all components and starts the scan/websocket loops.

tour.title: Follow the Scan Pipeline
tour.description: Trace scan_underlying through quote, option-chain, smoothing, scoring, strike selection, sizing, and entry.

tour.title: Understand Signal Construction
tour.description: Inspect the five independent confirmation layers and how they become a score, trap score, signal, and CE/PE direction.

tour.title: Inspect Risk and Trade Blocking
tour.description: The observed run repeatedly reached executable signals but was blocked by lot-risk sizing; this is the central runtime finding.

tour.title: Review Live Protection
tour.description: When entries exist, websocket ticks drive premium SL, target, breakeven, spot trail, and exit callbacks.

tour.title: Use Logs as Feedback
tour.description: The log evidence shows missing IVR and VWAP volume on every scan, plus no order placements in this run.
